title: prd-os finding
description: One review finding attached to a PRD. Findings stream as JSONL (one JSON object per line) in the PRD's findings file. Every finding must have a disposition before the PRD can advance to `approved`.

id.description: Sequential within a PRD: finding-1, finding-2, ...

prd_id.description: Matches the `id` frontmatter of the target PRD.

source.description: Who produced this finding. Codex output should be normalized into this shape via a deterministic template step; the schema does not trust raw Codex output.

disposition.description: `pending` is the initial state. A PRD cannot advance to `approved` while any finding is still `pending`.

rationale.description: Required when disposition is `rejected` or `deferred`. Explains why the finding is not being fixed now.

body.description: The finding itself. Plain text. Keep to one concrete concern per finding.
